name: power-plant-equipment-tracker
description: Orchestrator for VoltSync Power Plant Equipment Tracking System

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix mobile
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev-all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix mobile"
